---
title: "Homework 3 MARS"
author: "Liam Cawley"
date: "2025-11-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list= ls()) # Clearing Memory
```

```{r}
library(dplyr) # Loading Packages
library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(webshot2)
library(magick)
library(survival)
library(ROCit)
library(DescTools)
library(mgcv)
library(caret)
library(Metrics)
library(splines)
library(segmented)
library(earth)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(Ckmeans.1d.dp)
library(pdp)
library(glmnet)
```

```{r}
training <- read.csv("insurance_t.csv") # Loading data
length(training)
set.seed(12345) # Set for reproducability of all code

```

```{r}
validation <- read.csv("insurance_v.csv")
length(validation)
```

```{r}
median(training$CRSCORE, na.rm = TRUE)
Mode(training$CRSCORE, na.rm = TRUE)
#table(training$CRSCORE)
```

```{r}
# Imputations: 
colSums(is.na(training))
```

```{r}
colSums(is.na(validation))
```


```{r}
# NA's: ACCTAGE, PHONE, POS, POSAMT, INV, INVBAL, CC, CCBAL, CCPURC, INCOME, LORES, HMVAL, AGE, CRSCORE

# New Imputations: 
training <- training %>%
  mutate(ACCTAGE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$ACCTAGE), 1, 0),
    ACCTAGE = ifelse(is.na(training$ACCTAGE), median(training$ACCTAGE, na.rm = TRUE), training$ACCTAGE),
    PHONE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$PHONE), 1, 0),
         PHONE = ifelse(is.na(training$PHONE), median(training$PHONE, na.rm = TRUE), training$PHONE),
    POS_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$POS), 1, 0),
         POS = ifelse(is.na(training$POS), median(training$POS, na.rm = TRUE), training$POS),
    POSAMT_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$POSAMT), 1, 0),
         POSAMT = ifelse(is.na(training$POSAMT), median(training$POSAMT, na.rm = TRUE), training$POSAMT),
    INV_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$INV), 1, 0),
         INV = ifelse(is.na(training$INV), median(training$INV, na.rm = TRUE), training$INV),
    INVBAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$INVBAL), 1, 0),
         INVBAL = ifelse(is.na(training$INVBAL), median(training$INVBAL, na.rm = TRUE), training$INVBAL),
    CC_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$CC), 1, 0),
         CC = ifelse(is.na(training$CC), median(training$CC, na.rm = TRUE), training$CC),
    CCBAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$CCBAL), 1, 0),
         CCBAL = ifelse(is.na(training$CCBAL), median(training$CCBAL, na.rm = TRUE), training$CCBAL),
    CCPURC_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$CCPURC), 1, 0),
         CCPURC = ifelse(is.na(training$CCPURC), median(training$CCPURC, na.rm = TRUE), training$CCPURC),
    INCOME_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$INCOME), 1, 0),
         INCOME = ifelse(is.na(training$INCOME), median(training$INCOME, na.rm = TRUE), training$INCOME),
    LORES_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$LORES), 1, 0),
         LORES = ifelse(is.na(training$LORES), median(training$LORES, na.rm = TRUE), training$LORES),
    HMVAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$HMVAL), 1, 0),
         HMVAL = ifelse(is.na(training$HMVAL), median(training$HMVAL, na.rm = TRUE), training$HMVAL),
    AGE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$AGE), 1, 0),
         AGE = ifelse(is.na(training$AGE), median(training$AGE, na.rm = TRUE), training$AGE),
    CRSCORE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(training$CRSCORE), 1, 0),
         CRSCORE = ifelse(is.na(training$CRSCORE), median(training$CRSCORE, na.rm = TRUE), training$CRSCORE)
         )
```

```{r}
#Validation Imputations
validation <- validation %>%
  mutate(ACCTAGE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$ACCTAGE), 1, 0),
    ACCTAGE = ifelse(is.na(validation$ACCTAGE), median(training$ACCTAGE, na.rm = TRUE), validation$ACCTAGE),
    PHONE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$PHONE), 1, 0),
         PHONE = ifelse(is.na(validation$PHONE), median(training$PHONE, na.rm = TRUE), validation$PHONE),
    POS_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$POS), 1, 0),
         POS = ifelse(is.na(validation$POS), median(training$POS, na.rm = TRUE), validation$POS),
    POSAMT_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$POSAMT), 1, 0),
         POSAMT = ifelse(is.na(validation$POSAMT), median(training$POSAMT, na.rm = TRUE), validation$POSAMT),
    INV_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$INV), 1, 0),
         INV = ifelse(is.na(validation$INV), median(training$INV, na.rm = TRUE), validation$INV),
    INVBAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$INVBAL), 1, 0),
         INVBAL = ifelse(is.na(validation$INVBAL), median(training$INVBAL, na.rm = TRUE), validation$INVBAL),
    CC_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$CC), 1, 0),
         CC = ifelse(is.na(validation$CC), median(training$CC, na.rm = TRUE), validation$CC),
    CCBAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$CCBAL), 1, 0),
         CCBAL = ifelse(is.na(validation$CCBAL), median(training$CCBAL, na.rm = TRUE), validation$CCBAL),
    CCPURC_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$CCPURC), 1, 0),
         CCPURC = ifelse(is.na(validation$CCPURC), median(training$CCPURC, na.rm = TRUE), validation$CCPURC),
    INCOME_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$INCOME), 1, 0),
         INCOME = ifelse(is.na(validation$INCOME), median(training$INCOME, na.rm = TRUE), validation$INCOME),
    LORES_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$LORES), 1, 0),
         LORES = ifelse(is.na(validation$LORES), median(training$LORES, na.rm = TRUE), validation$LORES),
    HMVAL_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$HMVAL), 1, 0),
         HMVAL = ifelse(is.na(validation$HMVAL), median(training$HMVAL, na.rm = TRUE), validation$HMVAL),
    AGE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$AGE), 1, 0),
         AGE = ifelse(is.na(validation$AGE), median(training$AGE, na.rm = TRUE), validation$AGE),
    CRSCORE_FLAG = ifelse(is.na(validation$CRSCORE), 1, 0),
         CRSCORE = ifelse(is.na(validation$CRSCORE), median(training$CRSCORE, na.rm = TRUE), validation$CRSCORE)
         )
```


MARS Modeling
```{r}
# mars model without cross-validation (CV)
mars <- earth(INS ~ ., data=training, degree=1, glm = list(family = binomial))
```

```{r}
summary(mars)

# Mean Absolute Error (MAE)
# get actuals
actuals_mars <- training$INS

# get predictions
predictions_mars <- predict(mars, type = "response")

# Calculate MAE
mae_mars <- mean(abs(predictions_mars - actuals_mars))
print(paste("Mean Absolute Error (MAE):", mae_mars))
```
Training Data Output

```{r}

train_num <- training
train_x_num <- model.matrix(INS ~ ., data = training)[, -1] # Requires numeric response (not factor)
train_y_num <- training$INS
```

```{r}
train_num$INS.predict.probs <- as.numeric(predict(mars, newdata = training, type = "response")) # Probabilities for ROC

# Creating ROC curve
roc.mars <- rocit(score = train_num$INS.predict.probs, # Want probabilities of success for ROC curve
             class = train_num$INS)
plot(roc.mars, col = "#1F77B4", lwd = 2, legend = FALSE)

  # Saving ROC values for evaluation
roc.mars.df <- data.frame(
  cutoff = roc.mars$Cutoff,
  TPR = roc.mars$TPR,
  FPR = roc.mars$FPR, 
  AUC = roc.mars$AUC
)

roc.mars.df <- roc.mars.df %>% mutate(
  specificity = 1 - FPR,
  youden = TPR + (specificity - 1)
)

opt.mars.cutoff <- roc.mars.df[which.max(roc.mars.df$youden), ]; opt.mars.cutoff # Printing metrics for the best cutoff
```
Validation Data Output
```{r}

val_num <- validation
val_x_num <- model.matrix(INS ~ ., data = validation)[, -1] # Requires numeric response (not factor)
val_y_num <- validation$INS
```

```{r}
val_num$INS.predict.probs <- as.numeric(predict(mars, newdata = validation, type = "response")) # Probabilities for ROC

# Creating ROC curve
roc.mars <- rocit(score = val_num$INS.predict.probs, # Want probabilities of success for ROC curve
             class = val_num$INS)
plot(roc.mars, col = "#1F77B4", lwd = 2, legend = FALSE)

  # Saving ROC values for evaluation
roc.mars.df <- data.frame(
  cutoff = roc.mars$Cutoff,
  TPR = roc.mars$TPR,
  FPR = roc.mars$FPR, 
  AUC = roc.mars$AUC
)

roc.mars.df <- roc.mars.df %>% mutate(
  specificity = 1 - FPR,
  youden = TPR + (specificity - 1)
)

opt.mars.cutoff2 <- roc.mars.df[which.max(roc.mars.df$youden), ]; opt.mars.cutoff2 # Printing metrics for the best cutoff
```
